use criterion::{black_box, criterion_group, criterion_main, Criterion};

fn load_dataset_from_disk(path: &str) -> Vec<u8> {
    std::fs::read(path).unwrap()
}

fn process_data(data: &[u8]) -> usize {
    data.iter().filter(|b| **b > 0x7f).count()
}

fn bench_processing(c: &mut Criterion) {
    // GOOD: setup outside the measured closure using iter_batched
    let dataset = load_dataset_from_disk("/tmp/large_dataset.bin");

    c.bench_function("process_dataset", |b| {
        b.iter(|| {
            let result = process_data(black_box(&dataset));
            result
        })
    });
}

criterion_group!(benches, bench_processing);
criterion_main!(benches);
